payment_terms.note: Finance requires minimum Net 30 for all new vendors

liability.never_accept: Caps below $50,000 for contracts over $100k ACV

discounts.standard_floor: No more than 15% off list price

ip.vendor_carveout: Vendor retains background IP and platform code
ip.never_accept: Full IP assignment to vendor on custom work

sla.support_response: 4 hours for critical, 24 hours for standard
sla.never_accept: Below 99.5% uptime or 48h+ response on critical
